== Notes for [[Item:Q90499|Q90499]] ==

ID: I86625

Name: Cassia Longina Longinus

Given Name: Cassia Longina

Surname: Longinus

Sex: F

_UID: 2150CD3134A0FC4D88EC3F09A69F8E052041

Change Date: 15 Oct 2005

Death: ABT 50

Father: C. Cassius Longinus

Mother: Junia Lepida Silanus

Marriage 1 Gneus Domitus Corbulo b: 5

Children

Domitia Longina b: 52

Forrás / Source:

http://wc.rootsweb.ancestry.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=jdp-fam&id=I86625

--------------------
ID: I86625

Name: Cassia Longina Longinus

Given Name: Cassia Longina

Surname: Longinus

Sex: F

_UID: 2150CD3134A0FC4D88EC3F09A69F8E052041

Change Date: 15 Oct 2005

Death: ABT 50

Father: C. Cassius Longinus

Mother: Junia Lepida Silanus

Marriage 1 Gneus Domitus Corbulo b: 5

Children

Domitia Longina b: 52

Forrás / Source:

http://wc.rootsweb.ancestry.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=jdp-fam&id=I86625

CASSIA LONGINA (L) LONGINUS

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
